user.title: MinVandforsyning
user.description: Enter your water meter number. You can find it on the minvandforsyning.dk page header or on your water bill.

confirm.title: Confirm meter
confirm.description:
Found meter {meter_number} at supplier {supplier_id}.

Do you want to add this meter?

error.invalid_meter_number: Please enter a valid meter number.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the MinVandforsyning API.
abort.meter_not_found: Could not find data for this meter number. Please verify the number and try again.
